title: If you purchased Platinum Vol 1 read this
display_title: If you purchased Platinum Vol 1 read this
wikitext:
[]: If you purchased Platinum Vol 1, read this.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Dec 08, 2004 12:23 am Pop your disc in, go to episode 3, when Shinji is going into battle with Shamshel. Check and see if he says "Why am I piloting this thing again, even though my father's not here? Even though I was beaten". If he doesn't you're disc is missing dialogue, and you can request a replacement from them via their website. I have one. I'm not a dub fan, but I still don't like the idea of having a defective disc.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Dec 08, 2004 1:49 am Wow, I wasn't even aware of the possibility that that could be a defect. I just wrote it off as ADV doing their 'thang. So that'll be three Platinums I've returned.

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Wed Dec 08, 2004 8:03 am Thanks for the heads up, EM. I put in a request too since I have a defective disc as well. Hope the others aren't defective! :?

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Wed Dec 08, 2004 5:17 pm Booo. I got a defective one as well. Although it's not that big a deal, I like to have things right if I'm going to pay for them. Well... looks like that's getting the ol' heave-ho back to the factory. o_<

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Dec 08, 2004 6:02 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Wow, I wasn't even aware of the possibility that that could be a defect. I just wrote it off as ADV doing their 'thang. So that'll be three Platinums I've returned.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 01 » Thu Dec 09, 2004 7:00 pm mine's defective too. I just sent an email out. Man this sucks I never expected such a careless and obvious mistake to pass by them. I mean, don't they check these things out before they send em to the shelves? I guess they they were in a hurry to get those checks rolling in.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Thu Dec 09, 2004 9:07 pm w00t mines going back too (or un-w00t) Man, this is why I kinda scared of buying the Rahxephon movie. Damn you, ADV, you anime-hording, DVD-fucker-upers!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Thu Dec 09, 2004 11:44 pm is the defect limited to just that one line of dialogue missing? i

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 10, 2004 11:00 am Shortly after the line mentioned, there's two "Yes" lines that are missing, and I wouldn't be surprised if there's more missing, on different Eps/DVDs. Time will tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Sat Dec 11, 2004 7:27 pm damn, mine is defective as well. even when they take months to release it out here in new zealand they still don't fix their mistakes. i just hope its the only thing they missed. bastards.

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Sun Dec 12, 2004 8:40 pm Mines defective, though I don't care I hate the dub, and it will make a good collectors item!

[]:             Quote Post by WholeLottaChaos » Wed Dec 15, 2004 7:30 am Hmmm it looks like I have a non defect copy..... <.< >.> Any of you guys feel like trading? :?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Dec 28, 2004 3:56 am I have got info , that is is not defective and it is part of the edit. Eva monkey where did you hear this ???? and could you put up an orginal copy of this. Edited Never mind , I found the info on the main page :oops: :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by the-artist-known-as-chris » Sun Jan 02, 2005 6:19 am Yep, same problem on mine, gonna get a new copy aswell. What a anoyance.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Sun Jan 02, 2005 9:47 am Um... has anyone gotten their new copy yet? I reported it to ADV weeks ago, and I still haven't gotten anything yet. o_o;

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jan 02, 2005 3:59 pm No.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 01 » Sun Jan 02, 2005 8:52 pm I talked with them on Dec 10. Haven't got nothin yet

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Sun Jan 02, 2005 9:38 pm me neither, they said they were going to send me a package to return it in but i havn't seen anything for almost a month.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 03, 2005 12:04 am Score one for ADV's customer service, however you can probably attribute it to the fact that its the holidays. I would expect them to be a bit busier than usual.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jan 03, 2005 1:25 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Score one for ADV's customer service, however you can probably attribute it to the fact that its the holidays. I would expect them to be a bit busier than usual.
